name: Creole Red Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans; soak in water for 30 minutes, then cook slowly until tender (about 2 hours), adding boiling water as necessary.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Heat bacon drippings in a skillet; sauté ham, salt pork, or sausage until browned. Add onions and garlic, cooking until translucent.
4. Stir the sautéed ingredients into the cooked beans along with parsley.
5. Remove about 1 cup of beans; mash or stir through a sieve to thicken the juices and add back to the beans.
6. Serve over hot rice.
